title: stelis santiagoensis
intro: Stelis santiagoensis is a species of orchid, belonging to the genus Stelis, characterized by its unique and delicate features. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis santiagoensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of Stelis santiagoensis can be made by infusing the plant's leaves or roots in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in topical creams and ointments.
